summary: Researched JSONL ingestion pipeline. Found two coexisting schema layers (data.schema LabeledFormula vs schema.TrainingRecord) with multiple field mismatches requiring translation. Identified box formula validation bug in schema/formula.py. Recommended in-memory BimodalDataset with Parquet caching, difficulty-stratified splits, and CurriculumSampler. data/ingestion.py is a stub awaiting implementation.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of schema mismatches, PyTorch Dataset patterns, HuggingFace integration, split strategies, and 4-phase implementation plan for the static data ingestion pipeline
